text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 19 

DIALYS_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Dialysis Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for Part B dialysis services (primarily the professional 
component since treatments are covered in hospital outpatient) for a given year. Dialysis claims are a 
subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 

Dialysis claim lines
